name: Homemade Breadmaker Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir together to distribute evenly.
3. Divide into packages: 2 1/4 cups for use in a 1 pound breadmaker or 3 1/3 cups for larger capacity machines.
4. Seal and label with date and contents.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within six months.
Makes about 14 cups of Breadmaker Mix.
